structure.description: Misleading opening about a potential secret daughter.
Group wide shot showing the studio and product display.
Celebrity sharing the personal story of brand endorsement.
Brand owner explains the 22-year packaging logic.
Detailed shot of the long-standing product packaging.

perShot.prompt: Handheld shot of {character_A} and {character_B} in {scene}, expressing {emotion}, {style} style.
Static wide shot of {character_A}, {character_B}, and {character_C} in {scene} with {product} display, {style} style.
Medium shot of {character_B} speaking in {scene}, blurred background, showing {emotion}, {style} style.
Medium shot of {character_C} holding {product} and talking to {character_B} in {scene}, {style} style.
Extreme close-up of {product} featuring {character_B} portrait, {style} style.
Handheld medium shot of {character_A} and {character_B} laughing in {scene}, {style} style.
